agent.input: Send the project status report to client@external.com

arguments.ticket_content:
Request to send project status report to external client

Department: Sales
Requester: Bob

I need to send a project status report to client@external.com. The email system appears to be blocking this request. Please assist with:

1. Sending the project status report to client@external.com
2. Or providing alternative methods to share this report with the external client

The report contains standard project status information including milestones, accomplishments, and budget status.

Thank you for your assistance.
